lines.english: Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Nanak: my honor and glory are Yours, God. ||4||40||109||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਤੁਮ ਭਏ ਸਮਰਥ ਅੰਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau tum bhe samarath angaa |
lines.english: Those who have You on their side, O All-powerful Lord

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਧਉ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਹੈ ਆਸ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: maadhau jaa kau hai aas tumaaree |
lines.english: O Lord of wealth, those who place their hopes in You

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕਉ ਕਛੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਸੰਸਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: taa kau kachh naahee sansaaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: - nothing of the world can touch them at all. ||1||Pause||
- no black stain can stick to them. ||1||
Those whose hearts are filled with their Lord and Master
- no anxiety can affect them. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਤੁਮ ਦੀਨੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਧੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau tum deenee prabh dheer |
lines.english: Those, unto whom You give Your consolation, God
who has shown me the Perfect, Supreme Lord God. ||4||41||110||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੈ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਪੀਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: taa kai nikatt na aavai peer |3|
lines.english: - pain does not even approach them. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਮੈ ਸੋ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak mai so gur paaeaa |
lines.english: Says Nanak, I have found that Guru,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਜਪਹਿ ਤੇ ਆਤਮ ਘਾਤੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam na japeh te aatam ghaatee |1|
lines.english: Those who do not meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, are murderers of the soul. ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
This human body is so difficult to obtain; it is only obtained by great good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਹੀ ਜਿਨਾ ਬਿਸਰਤ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: mar na jaahee jinaa bisarat raam |
lines.english: Those who forget the Lord might just as well die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਹੂਨ ਜੀਵਨ ਕਉਨ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam bihoon jeevan kaun kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Naam, of what use are their lives? ||1||Pause||
Those who do not listen to the Praises of the Lord of supreme bliss,
Eating, drinking, playing, laughing and showing off
- what use are the ostentatious displays of the dead? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਸੁ ਪੰਖੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਗਦ ਜੋਨਿ ਤੇ ਮੰਦਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: pas pankhee trigad jon te mandaa |3|
lines.english: are worse off than beasts, birds or creeping creatures. ||3||
the Name alone is contained within my heart. ||4||42||111||
Says Nanak, the GurMantra has been implanted within me;
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
They are relatives in name only- they are all false. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾ ਕੀ ਮਾਈ ਕਾ ਕੋ ਬਾਪ ॥
lines.translit: kaa kee maaee kaa ko baap |
lines.english: Whose mother is this? Whose father is this?
There is the one dust, the one light,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਜੋਗਿ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਤੂੰ ਆਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mil sanjog hukam toon aaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By good destiny and the Lord's Order, you have come into the world. ||1||Pause||
Why are you screaming and shouting, you fool?
This soul is not perishable. ||3||
the one praanic wind. Why are you crying? For whom do you cry? ||2||
People weep and cry out, "Mine, mine!"
I am liberated, and my doubts have been dispelled. ||4||43||112||
Says Nanak, the Guru has opened my shutters;
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
are afflicted by the disease of anxiety. ||1||
Those who seem to be great and powerful,
Who is great by the greatness of Maya?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਵਡਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਰਾਮ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: so vaddaa jin raam liv laaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They alone are great, who are lovingly attached to the Lord. ||1||Pause||
The landlord fights over his land each day.
He shall have to leave it in the end, and yet his desire is still not satisfied. ||2||
without the Lord's meditation, there is no salvation. ||3||44||113||
Says Nanak, this is the essence of Truth:
One's honor remains perfect, when the Perfect Lord preserves it.
Everything is perfect, if the Naam is in the heart. ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Perfect is the path; perfect is the cleansing bath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਿ ਜਨ ਤਾਕੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham kee saran jan taakee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: His servant takes to the Sanctuary of the Supreme Lord God. ||1||Pause||
Perfect is the penance; perfect is the Raja Yoga, the Yoga of meditation and success. ||2||
Perfect is the peace; perfect is the contentment.
Perfect is their glory; perfect is their humanity. ||3||
On the Lord's Path, sinners are purified.
They dwell forever in the Presence of the Creator Lord.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ਮਿਟੇ ਅਘ ਕੋਟ ॥
lines.translit: sant kee dhoor mitte agh kott |
lines.english: Millions of sins are wiped away by the dust of the feet of the Saints.
Says Nanak, my True Guru is Perfect. ||4||45||114||
